heroHeadline: $14B Arms Package Awaits Trump Nod as Summit Postponed; PLA Sorties Spike to 16 on Mar 25
heroSubtitle: HIMARS deadline expires Mar 26 with parliament-authorized signing; Trump-Xi Beijing summit pushed back 5–6 weeks over Iran conflict
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
